title: Geschichte des Zigeunermädchens: Eine Novelle
summaries: "Geschichte des Zigeunermädchens: Eine Novelle" by Miguel de Cervantes Saavedra is a novella published in 1613. It follows Preciosa, a fifteen-year-old Roma girl celebrated for her beauty and talent in Madrid. When a nobleman falls for her, he agrees to abandon his privileged life and live two years with her Roma family to prove his devotion. But when jealousy leads to violence and a long-hidden crime surfaces, their future hangs in the balance in this tale of love across social divides. (This is an automatically generated summary.)
subjects: Cervantes Saavedra, Miguel de, 1547-1616 -- Translations into German
